positive: A celestial map illustration featuring constellations and mythical space creatures (like a griffin or phoenix) orbiting a glowing nebula. The style is highly detailed, cosmic, and iridescent, using deep purples, blues, and golds. Art Nouveau influence, ethereal, magical realism.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, simple, cartoon, mundane objects
